case_title: KARNILOWIEZ HENRY (DBA ACCIDENTAL EXPRESS) VS AHUVA JOLISH

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL TO AHUVA JOLISH RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY KARNILOWIEZ HENRY  (DBA ACCIDENTAL EXPRESS) AS TO DEFENDANT AHUVA JOLISH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CIVIL SUBPENA DUCES TECUM SERVED AS TO KEMPER NATIONAL INSURANCE

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KARNILOWIEZ HENRY  (DBA ACCIDENTAL EXPRESS) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AHUVA JOLISH PLTF EVIDENCE UNABLE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF BY THE PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
